programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend // Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! Can Rumble use Bentley's instincts to help them track down their puppy pal? // A big winter storm is headed for town...and it's Christmas Eve! What if Santa can't find them through the snow? Rev and the kids round up their own toys and deliver them to all the kids in town-just in case! But can they make it through the storm?

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Sing and Dance
programme.desc: Sing, dance & learn with fun songs about health, nature, and classic rhymes!

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Kids Planet
programme.desc: Wow, I Never Knew That! is a whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Berry and Dolly
programme.desc: Berry, the little snail boy and Dolly, the ladybird are best friends. Together they discover the world around them, while they make new friends with Balthazar the bee, Flutter the butterfly, Stanley the stag-beetle, Leapy the grasshopper, and many others.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing is a creative journey combining art like Glitter Fish, Mermaid, and relaxation.

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: This wonderful collection of classic rhymes has Miss Polly Had A Dolly, Baa Baa Black Sheep & more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Get grooving with a medley of fun kids songs like Dinosaur Song, Fruits Song, and Colors Song

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie and Ben - Episode 7
programme.desc: Annie, Ben and Mango find themselves on Japan's Rabbit Island, where the king of bunnies challenges Ben to a race. We've all heard the story of the hare and the tortoise! Will Ben be the slow and steady one? Or will he snooze and lose?

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben - Episode 1
programme.desc: There's a Dragon's pearl hunt on Great Wall with Annie, Ben & Mango! Get ready for a fun adventure!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here is a collection of back to back classic rhymes like Simple Simon,Twinkle Twinkle Little Star.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Let's Go To Sleep, Silent Night are bedtime lullabies guiding little ones to peaceful dream world.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: From I hear thunder to Farmer in the Dell presenting lullabies that will help kids sleep well.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Sweet lullabies that gently ease children into a restful night's sleep.

programme.title: Soothing Melodies
programme.desc: Immerse in a world of Soothing Melodies like Finger Family, Little Boy Blue, and more

programme.title: Let's Move!
programme.desc: ducktv's let's move! episodes are all about sports, physical exercises and outdoor adventures. This section promotes movement and motor skills, develops basic coordination and a sense of rhythm through exercising.

programme.title: Santa's Castle
programme.desc: When evil creatures kidnap Santa Claus, his loyal assistants set out to rescue him before Christmas disappears forever.

programme.desc: Meet Slick Slime Sam, a talking slime who is pink, hilarious and ready to help with your latest DIY or life hack project.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Friendship goes bad when Talking Tom's happy customer service representative turns into a villain.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Talking Ginger's wish is everyone's command when Talking Tom and Talking Ben's Assertive App backfires.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Atomic Betty - Amulet of Shangri-La-De-Da: Betty is called upon to protect an amulet of the ancient bird-people of Shangri-La-De-Da, said to give the wearer unimaginable power. Meanwhile, Purrsy gets stuck up a tree on Earth, enough to cause mass disturbia./ Minimus has accidentally created a new super suit that makes Maximus all powerful is the only thing capable of defeating this "Mighty Maximus" is two Betties? Meanwhile, Betty and her friends go to a fair.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Atomic Betty - Takes One to Know One: Betty has been invited to Noah's place, where he is about to demonstrate to her a satellite radio (that inadvertently eavesdrops on Admiral DeGill's personal activities). Leaving, she sees Paloma being chased by Duncan as a result of a prank. Before Duncan can catch either of them, a spaceship appears out of nowhere and abducts Paloma, to Betty's horror. Beaming aboard her ship, she discovers that Sparky and X-5 are being held hostage by Paloma's younger sister, Juanita. Demanding an explanation, Juanita explains that she is, in fact, a Galactic Guardian who is responsible for Paloma's safety. Betty and her crew is forced to accept help from Juanita to save Paloma.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Super K's Gone Bad: The Super K's are doing horrible, no good, super bad things all over Greenville, but… is it really them? When Nigel Danforth is involved, all bets are off!

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - The Substitute: When Mr. Arnold misses class to attend a Retired Superhero meeting, the new substitute teaches the Super K's a lesson on trusting their instincts.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Raiders of the Lost Jewel / In Gronk We Trust: Professor Woodraven enlists the help of the Paq to find the famed Jewel of Kaheelee hidden somewhere in the wilds outside of Orlanta. Himari, Fleming, and Klaus jump at the chance, but not all is as it seems. When the Professor turns out to be an impostor, the Paw must race to save the precious jewel from the thief. / Shaq hosts a charity basketball game and tasks each member of the Paq with picking up items and helping set up for the event. Gronk begs Shaq to let him pick up the most important item, the winning trophy, and Shaq agrees. The rest of the Paq thinks it's a bad idea, but Gronk aims to prove them wrong. After getting distracted multiple times, Gronk has to dig deep to prove that Shaq's trust in his wasn't a mistake.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Donut Caper / Klaus' Lie: Marlowe Sternwood, the Girl Fun Group Troop Leader, asks the Paq to help find the missing delivery of the annual assorted donut sale's donuts. Biggie D, Fleming, and Tibbs race out to find out what happened with the missing truck. Quickly they discover the evil Keeter Reebus is behind it and they have to locate the missing shipment before time runs out / Klaus tells Shaq that he needs maintenance to get out of volunteering on the first day of the Boys and Girls Club Rolling Wood Derby so he can race Niccolo Tessio. After winning, he thinks he's in the clear and can make the derby the next day. When Niccolo challenges him to yet another race, Klaus has to decided what's more important: beating Niccolo or fulfilling his promise to Shaq.

programme.title: Angry Birds

programme.desc: Megatron blocks all radio waves and communications on Earth and makes his demands clear.

programme.desc: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los supervivientes de Woodbury se han unido al grupo de Rick en la prisión, crían animales, cultivan y todo parece ir bien. Sin embargo, el grupo va a descubrir que el peligro no siempre llega desde afuera.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick establece una cuarentena para evitar que el virus se propague entre la población de la cárcel. Tyreese descubre que alguien ha asesinado y quemado los cadáveres de su novia y su amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl encabeza un grupo que sale de la cárcel en busca de medicamentos y, durante el trayecto, oyen por radio que alguien habla de un santuario. Rick averigua quién asesinó a Karen y David y por qué lo hizo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Carol salen en busca de comida y ocurre algo que cambia su relación para siempre. Mientras, el otro grupo sigue buscando medicinas y, durante la misión, Bob le confiesa a Tyreese que es alcohólico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio se burla de Tim, y le aclara que ahora no recibe órdenes. Acabará con Meléndez porque ahora es el jefe. Garnica amenaza a Ignacio con los Emes si no lo ayuda a limpiar su expediente.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio le asegura a Javi que no es un soplón. Tim le pide a Julia que convenza a Meléndez de que no vuelva a México, sin sospechar que Casillas y Víctor van a Washington para eliminarlo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica cae de nuevo en los brazos de Aurelio, quien le confiesa que planeó el ataque al rancho para salir de Irma, pero también murió Chabela. Marcado y Garnica le tienden una trampa al Chema.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Chema escapa del ataque de Marcado. Rutila no se salva y paga las consecuencias. A Marcado no le importa nada, y mata a su propia familia frente a los ojos de la hija de Casillas.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Destrozada, Rutila le cuenta al Chema que Marcado la violó y le echa la culpa. Llama a Aurelio para que la ayude a vengarse, pero Venegas le dice que si habla, no volverá a ver a su hijo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio se encuentra cara a cara con el Chema y le exige que le devuelva a su nieto, mientras Rutila se desahoga con Víctor y le advierte que ahora los dos enfrentan el odio muy de cerca.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Tim amenaza a Aurelio con detener a su familia, pero los planes de Morejón lo llevan a pactar con él la muerte de su jefe, Jack Meléndez. Rivero desconfía de Rawlings y aún no sabe la verdad.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Rutila, angustiada, se refugia en Aurelio y le cuenta que Marcado la violó él jura vengarse y rescatar a su hijo. Casillas sorprende a Víctor al pedirle ver a Cristina porque se va a entregar.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Ladrones de videos de bebés Subastaste mi virginidad por amor
programme.desc: Elisa contrató a Alessandra para poner cámaras de vigilancia en su casa y las hackearon. Por otro lado, Maryan y Kelly acordaron subastar su virginidad y así repartirse el dinero.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: La frase de la discordia Roja realidad
programme.desc: La hija de Irma se suicidó porque un video pornográfico suyo se hizo viral. Por otro lado, Oscar fue secuestrado y sufrió incontables violaciones, ahora se corta para olvidar el dolor.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: El que la hace, la paga El destete
programme.desc: Amanda quiere adoptar a una bebé, sin saber que es la hija de su esposo con otra mujer. La madre de Arlet inicia un negocio de amamantar hombres, luego de ayudar a su yerno con un trauma.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Leomil tiene tres hijas con Oneida, pero una de ellas es abusadora con las demás. En otro caso, Edgar es el encargado de gestionar el dinero que dejó la madre de José y Amanda, y ya queda muy poco.

programme.desc: Néstor solo puede hacer el amor con su esposa si ella está dormida. Además, cuando está a punto de entrar a su trabajo, Ignacio tiene que regresar a su casa para ir al baño.

programme.title: Caso cerrado

programme.desc: Valeria se hace pasar por fotógrafa para acercarse a Mía. Miguel advierte a Mia sobre Esteban. Roberta le pide a Mia que la reemplace en la banda. Roberta viaja con su papá a España. Vico se burla de Mia porque está sola y ella tiene a Joaquín.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel reta a Esteban y se agarran a golpes Joaquín termina con Vico diciéndole que es por la logia Miguel sospecha que Esteban forma parte de la logia Pilar le dice a Vico que regresó con Joaquín Franco planea presentar a Valeria con Mia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel le reclama a Julieta porque salió con su ex-novio sin avisarle en España, el papá de Roberta no la deja comunicarse con Alma Valeria le cuenta a Franco que pasó todo el día con Mia por instrucciones de León, Paola trata de seducir a Diego.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Ricardo le da instrucciones a Mario. Jimena le confiesa a Camila que se está enamorando de Mario. Úrsula besa a Vasco.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Alberto y Jorge planean casar a sus respectivos hijos. Alberto visita a Eustaquio. Ricardo quiere enviar a doña Jimena fuera del pueblo para que no la arresten.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Inés le reclama a Vasco por buscar de nuevo a Úrsula. Camila y Jimena son escoltadas por los hombres de Ricardo para salir del pueblo. Sofía habla de nuevo con Santiago.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Eustaquio va a casa de Ricardo para citar a Camila. Justo corre a Vasco de la casa. Lisabeta y Ricardo exponen sus casos ante el juez.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Álvaro invita a cenar a Esmeralda y le confiesa el amor que siente, pero ella no está lista para enamorarse. La boda está por llevarse a cabo y Graciela pide que Adrián no asista. Sin embargo, ella podría tomar una resolución de último momento.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: La boda de Graciela y Emiliano se lleva a cabo, a pesar de que ella y Adrián se quieren. Adrián debe de llevarla a la iglesia donde se realizará la ceremonia. Esmeralda visita al doctor Lazcano y, al llegar, reconoce a alguien.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Dionisio y Florecita viajan a la ciudad para visitar a Adrián y, al llegar, ambos encuentran que no era verdad lo que él contaba en sus cartas. Blanca convence a Dominga para que le permita llevar al niño para que lo conozca Rodolfo.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Rodolfo le dice a Adrián que lleve a su padre a una cita médica con José Armando. Una vez ahí, el doctor Peñarreal confirma una lesión pulmonar en el capataz. En tanto, Melesio comete una indiscreción con Lucio.

programme.desc: Un grupo de luchadores se enfrenta a un científico demente que crea un artefacto que tiene la fuerza de diez atletas.

programme.desc: Al morir su madre, una joven sale del convento donde estudia y trabaja como sirvienta en una casa rica.

programme.title: Un sábado más

programme.title: Los olvidados
programme.desc: Una historia de Luis Buñuel, acerca de la pobreza y el crimen juvenil en los suburbios de la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: Un gallo en corral ajeno
programme.desc: Una mujer que recoge a vagabundos para reformarlos, recibe a Negrete, vestido de vagabundo, sin sospechar quién es.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que por su gusto se enreda, que se salga como pueda
programme.desc: Cecilia y Roger tienen algún tiempo que se gustan, pero no se atreven a confesarlo. En una fiesta donde ingieren alcohol, ella se queda a dormir con su amiga Tania y Roger le roba un beso, pero Tania lo acusa de abusador.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: No hay quien al caído levante
programme.desc: Alicia está muy enamorada de Ángel, quien resulta ser un delincuente su amiga Julia le advierte sobre el extraño comportamiento de Ángel, y más tarde, descubre que él está implicado en el secuestro de la pequeña Letty.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Gladis publica artículos en su blog sobre cómo diariamente se cometen pecados capitales. Ella y dos de sus compañeras sufren un accidente, y entienden que cada pecado conlleva una consecuencia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cuando el gato no está, los ratones hacen fiesta
programme.desc: Un par de hermanos se quedan solos en su casa debido a una emergencia familiar. Durante una reunión, uno de ellos es convencido por uno de los asistentes para rentar su casa y organizar una fiesta, la cual tiene como fin vender droga.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven ingresa a una aplicación y conoce a un chico, de quien se enamora perdidamente sin saber que en realidad utiliza la foto de su hermano, pues teme mostrarse como realmente es.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: En todas partes se cuecen habas
programme.desc: Un joven decide huir de su casa porque su padre no quiere que él sea pintor, su decisión lo podría poner en peligro al refugiarse con la persona equivocada.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A quien hiere con la boca, curar con ella le toca
programme.desc: Una joven difama en redes sociales a otra, revelando que tiene un hijo y que es rechazada por su padre. Pronto, sus acciones tendrán consecuencias que harán que se arrepienta de ellas.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De joven de ilusiones, de viejo de recuerdos
programme.desc: Una joven tendrá que luchar por sus sueños a pesar de que la persona que ama no la apoya, lo que pondrá en riesgo su relación.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Sherlyn, Patricio Borghetti y Banda El Recodo
programme.desc: Bianca Marroquín presenta un fragmento de sus obras teatrales la Novicia Rebelde y Chicago junto a los pequeños. Sherlyn y Patricio Borghetti, se enfrentan en la prueba de karaoke de las estrellas. Finalmente un popurrí con la Banda el Recodo.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: María José, Julión Álvarez y Paty Cantú
programme.desc: Los cinco cantantes de la competencia estarán acompañados de grandes estrellas como Maria José, Julión Álvarez y Paty Cantú, los capitanes actuarán junto a Lety la fea, Tomás Mora y Rebeca Jones. Los Súper Poderosos son el escuadrón eliminado.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Gloria Trevi, regresa con un popurrí con los pequeños. Además en el Sketch la participación especial de Carlos Loret de Mola. Ana Brenda y Cynthia Urías se enfrentan en el karaoke. Los participantes celebran el cumpleaños de Galilea.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: El coro de la ciudad de México
programme.desc: Los pequeños Gigantes comienzan con un popurrí acompañados por el grupo Matute. Fernanda Castillo y Alan estrada compiten en el karaoke de las estrellas. Por primera vez los niños hacen duetos junto al Coro de la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Raquel Ortega, juez de la competencia realiza un baile mostrando su talento, Miguel, Hiroshi, Magaby y Jocelyn cantarán junto a un ensamble vocal. Los padres de los pequeños se enfrentan en una competencia de baile.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Personas con capacidades diferentes cuentan sus historias de lo que ha sido viajar a bordo de 'La bestia'. Una esperanza de llegar a La Casa Blanca es lo que tienen 'los mutilados'.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una familia con una vida normal cambia de la noche a la mañana cuando el pequeño Oliver es diagnosticado con una agresiva enfermedad. Los padres de Oliver son notificados y comienza el calvario de 36 horas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Teresa Rodríguez relata la historia de la recaptura de Joaquín Guzmán Loera 'El Chapo'. Desde el escape de 'El Chapo' junto con 'El Cholo' de la casa en Culiacán hasta la captura de ambos delincuentes en un hotel de paso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hay veces que las familias son separadas por situaciones fortuitas. Alejandro Muñoz es un periodista cuyo propósito en su programa de televisión es reunir a familias separadas por diversos motivos. Él cuenta algunas de sus experiencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La patrulla fronteriza de Estados Unidos tiene registro de que la mayoría de indocumentados que cruzan la frontera son centroamericanos. Dentro de esta población hay muchos menores de edad que viajan solos para reunirse con sus familiares.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En Nueva York existe una importante cantidad de población inmigrante proveniente de Casa Blanca, un pueblo del estado de Puebla en México. Ellos desean reunirse de nuevo con sus padres después de muchos años de no verlos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La inmigración a Estados Unidos se ha convertido en una industria con un enfoque monetario. En este episodio se dan a conocer las implicaciones monetarias además de los estragos emocionales que deja en los inmigrantes.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Salmo 100 es una organización que lleva mensajes de paz y reconciliación. Las historias de Daniel, Adrián o Giovanni son ejemplos de que usa Salmo 100 para ayudar a más personas que quieren salir del mundo del crimen organizado en la frontera.

programme.title: Gilberto Gil
programme.desc: Brazilian artist Gilberto Gil returns to Jazz à Vienne in France with a new round of singing that is inspired by his latest album ‘Fé na Festa': a mixture of celebration, tradition and even some rock now and then. Gilberto Gil, worldwide known for as musician and the Brazilian minister of Culture, was one of the pioneers of the cultural movement ‘tropicalismo'. This movement, with a strong character of social protest, combines elements of traditional Brazilian culture with modern art forms. Gilberto Gil's new sound clearly has its roots in Brazilian culture, yet it is always inspired by jazz.

programme.title: Paul Desmond
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Chucho Valdis
programme.desc: Legendary Cuban pianist Chucho Valdés brought his band ‘Jazz Batá 2' to the Malta Jazz Festival on July 19, 2019. The air was thick with anticipation as Valdés took to the stage, revisiting the small-group concept of his mythical 1972 Cuban album ‘Jazz Batá'. The batá repertoire – the deep classical music of West Africa – permeates Valdés' piano solos throughout the concert. Valdés's band consists of Dreiser Durruthy (Batas and vocals), Yaroldy Abreu (percussions and vocals), Abraham Mansfarroll (percussion), Ramón Vazquez Martirena-Bajo (bass guitar). They delivered a performance that reverberated through the historic island.

programme.title: Jaco Pastorius
programme.desc: The audience at the Montreal Jazz Festival in Canada was in for a treat on July 3, 1982, as a true musical innovator hit the stage: Jaco Pastorius, who transformed the electric bass into a formidable solo instrument. Combining intricate harmonics, fluid melodies, and unparalleled technical skill, Pastorius left a lasting impact on the music world. In this concert, he is accompanied by Peter Erskine (drums), Don Alias (percussion), Othello Molineaux (steel drums), Bob Mintzer (tenor sax and bass clarinet), and Randy Brecker (trumpet and electronics). They perform “Chicken”, “Donna Lee”, “Mr. Phone Bone”, and “Fannie Mae”. Don't miss this extraordinary opportunity to experience Jaco Pastorius's electrifying performance at the Montreal Jazz Festival 1982!

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Paco de Lucía
programme.sub-title: Germeringer Jazztage: Paco de Lucía & Group
programme.desc: This broadcast shows a rare appearance at the 1996 Germeringer Jazztage by the legendary flamenco guitarist Paco de Lucía and his sextet. Some may question the inclusion of a flamenco guitarist within a jazz festival. However, the similarities between flamenco and blues have been well documented: both are the outlet for a poor, disenfranchised minority, with a primitive strength, boundless capabilities for improvisation and a requirement for breathtaking virtuosity - all qualities shown by Paco de Lucía in this performance. Moreover, he has long been experimenting with jazz forms (evident even from his inclusion of bass, drums, and saxophone in his sextet), while still retaining the essence of the flamenco tradition. In his own words: “What I have tried to do is have a hand holding onto tradition and the other scratching, digging in other places trying to find new things I can bring into flamenco”.

programme.title: Bill Evans
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Benny Goodman, Scott Hamilton, John Bunch & Phil Flanigan
programme.sub-title: Benny Goodman Septet - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1982, legendary jazz clarinettist Benny Goodman performed at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague with his septet. The “King of Swing” revisited the atmosphere of the 1930s, when jazz enjoyed tremendous popularity.

programme.title: Coro Infantil Da Universidade de Lisboa, Orquesta Gulbenkian, Coro Gulbenkian & Michel Corboz
programme.desc: Bach's famous Saint Matthew Passion premiered on Good Friday of 1727 in the St. Thomas Church of Leipzig in Eastern Germany. Since then, it has become essential to the repertoire of Easter compositions. In this 2014 concert from the Grande Auditório Gulbenkian in Lisbon, the Portuguese Gulbenkian Orchestra interprets the work under the baton of Swiss conductor Michel Corboz, accompanied by the wonderful vocalists of the Gulbenkian Choir, and the children's choir Coro Infantil da Universidade de Lisboa. The soloists are Sandrine Piau (soprano), Carlos Mena (counter-tenor), Vincent Lièvre-Picard (evangelist), Christophe Genz (tenor), André Baleiro (Christ) and Peter Harvey (bass).

programme.title: Wiener Philharmoniker, Zubin Mehta, Andrea Rost & José Carreras
programme.desc: Maestro Zubin Mehta invites you to an evening of polkas, waltzes, and operetta melodies under the Viennese skies. During the Strauss Gala, Mehta and the Wiener Philharmoniker sweep through a selection of popular operetta melodies by Johann Strauss. The world-famous tenor José Carreras and the compelling lyric soprano Andrea Rost interpret such highlights as Wiener Blut, and songs from Der Zigeunerbaron. This concert was recorded at the Heldenplatz in Vienna in 1999.

programme.title: Claudio Abbado & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.desc: The Lucerne Festival Orchestra performs Gustav Mahler's Symphony No. 5 under the direction of Claudio Abbado. This unique orchestra was formed as part of the annual festival in Lucerne, Switzerland.

programme.title: Evgeny Kissin, Nikolai Demidenko, Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra & Antoni Wit
programme.desc: Antoni Wit conducts the Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra in performances of Chopin's Piano Concertos No. 1, Op. 11 and No. 2, Op. 21. Soloists are Nikolai Demidenko and Evgeny Kissin. After performing the first concerto, Demidenko encores with Chopin's Mazurka Op. 17/4. Kissin closes the concert with Chopin's Etude Op. 10/12 and the Waltz in E minor, Op. post. This concert was part of the celebration of Chopin's 200th anniversary in 2010. Chopin composed the second concerto one year before the Concerto No. 1 and completed both works at the age of 20, before leaving his home country Poland and moving to Paris.

programme.title: Janis Joplin
programme.desc: Janis Joplin rose to fame in the late 1960s and was known for her powerful, blues-inspired vocals. She died of an accidental drug overdose in 1970. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Janis Joplin.

programme.title: Jefferson Airplane
programme.desc: Jefferson Airplane was a rock band based in San Francisco, California, who pioneered psychedelic rock. Formed in 1965, the group defined the San Francisco Sound and was the first from the Bay Area to achieve international commercial success. They were headliners at the three most famous American rock festivals of the 1960s—Monterey, Woodstock and Altamont—and the first Isle of Wight Festival in England. Their 1967 break-out album Surrealistic Pillow ranks on the short list of most significant recordings of the "Summer of Love". Two songs from that album, "Somebody to Love" and "White Rabbit", are among Rolling Stone's "500 Greatest Songs of All Time." Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Jefferson Airplane.

programme.title: Céline Dion
programme.sub-title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success. Enjoy the biggest hits of the decade's most important artist: "Because You Loved Me", "All By Myself", "My Heart Will Go On", "I Drove All Night" and others!

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood
programme.sub-title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood - Live from MSG
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out three-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in late February 2008 when icons Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their all-too-brief days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969. Whether they will ever team again is unknown. But with Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood Live From Madison Square Garden fans everywhere are able to experience the sound and the glory of a performance on that famous stage by two of rock's greatest artists.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Beneath the Sea a compilation of spectacular underwater images from around the world. Captured in exclusively in 8K digital, Beneath the Sea features an award-winning original score by Alan Williams.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Return to Paradise 1
programme.desc: Escape to one of the world's most idyllic tropical islands for 2 hours of relaxing on the beach with "Return to Paradise,." The sequel to "A Day in Paradise" (2014), the film returns viewers to the hidden exotic Fijian island of Nanuku - a tiny palm-covered sandy atoll surrounded by magical lagoons brimming with sea life. The film lasts for 2 full hours and features a dynamic mix of stunning tropical island beach & palm tree scenes that will gently transport viewers around the island. Each scene lasts several minutes, allowing time to soak up the views & absorb the healing energies which paradise provides! There are also some aerial drone clips to give the viewer perspective from above.

programme.title: Islands of Paradise w Music
programme.desc: Transform any TV or digital screen into a window to the beautiful Yasawa islands of Fiji, with this one hour-long, soothing visual journey. Palm trees, tropical lagoons, birds chirping, waves lapping, golden sunsets and fiery sunrises are just a few of the scenes in store for the viewer. Enjoy nearly all the benefits of a relaxing tropical vacation from the comfort of your home!

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Step into a world where each artwork transports viewers to a whimsical realm where snowflakes dance & twinkling lights & laughter fills the air. The music in sets a groovy and euphoric holiday tone featuring flutes, bells, strings, and synth pads.
